news.title: Regular blood donations ensure sufficient supplies for emergency treatment
news.content: For some, blood donation has become a beautiful lifestyle, including Tran Thi Mai from Long Bien District in Ha Noi, who has donated blood more than 20 times since 2018.

news.title: Experts call on community to keep donating blood
news.content: Health experts have called on the community to maintain blood donation activities to ensure blood sources for emergency aid and treatment at hospitals.

news.title: Blood safety and availability
news.content: This WHO fact sheet outlines the key facts and figures, global status, and WHO response regarding the safety and availability of blood globally.

news.title: What to know about double red cell donation
news.content: Mayo Clinic outlines how double red cell donation works, who is eligible, and how it helps patients suffering from severe blood loss or conditions like sickle cell anemia.

news.title: Is it safe to donate platelets frequently?
news.content: Platelets are cells that assist with blood clotting and are frequently needed by cancer patients. Learn about the frequency, process, and safety of donating platelets.

news.title: Understanding the types of blood donation
news.content: Mayo Clinic explains the difference between whole blood, platelet, plasma, and double red cell donations, helping you choose the best way to make an impact.

news.title: Am I eligible to donate blood? Key requirements
news.content: Explore the eligibility requirements for age, weight, and general health to see if you can become a voluntary blood donor and start saving lives today.

news.title: Monitoring iron levels for regular blood donors
news.content: Mayo Clinic highlights the importance of maintaining healthy iron levels for frequent red blood cell donors, providing dietary and supplementation tips.

news.title: Blood donation: What to expect before, during, and after
news.content: Get a comprehensive walkthrough of the blood donation process, from registration and health screening to the donation itself and recovery tips.

news.title: Understanding blood types and compatibility
news.content: Cleveland Clinic explains the science behind ABO and Rh blood group systems, outlining who can receive your blood type in an emergency.

news.title: Cleveland Clinic guide to the blood donation process
news.content: Learn how Cleveland Clinic partners with leading organizations to conduct blood drives, and how donations support critical surgical procedures.

news.title: What is therapeutic phlebotomy and how does it work?
news.content: Cleveland Clinic explains how therapeutic phlebotomy is used to treat conditions like hemochromatosis by removing excess iron from the blood.

news.title: What to expect during a blood transfusion
news.content: A detailed overview of how blood transfusions are administered to patients, explaining the safety protocols, duration, and potential side effects.

news.title: WebMD guide: How to prepare for donating blood
news.content: WebMD outlines the essential preparation steps for blood donors, including staying hydrated, eating iron-rich foods, and avoiding fatty meals.

news.title: The physical and mental health benefits of donating blood
news.content: WebMD details the surprising health benefits of donating blood, from lower cardiovascular risk factors to the positive emotional impact of helping others.
